confirmation_message: Success — Your application was successfully submitted. We'll contact you if there are next steps.
confirmation_evidence: Green success banner on the Application tab (orchestrator-verified screenshot _recheck.png); form controls replaced by success state. DOM toast text confirmed via evaluate.
captcha_note: Ashby page carried invisible reCAPTCHA (recaptcha/grecaptcha in HTML) but produced NO interactive challenge on submit — self-cleared, consistent with other Ashby submits this run (Sierra, C1, Chime, Vercel).
live_verified_via: Patchright CDP port 9333; LinkedIn posting live (6 days old, 200+ applicants) + Ashby posting live with Apply form
sponsor_check: Sponsor-silent JD (no explicit no-sponsorship/ITAR clause). h1bdata: Chainalysis filed 54 LCAs FY22-24, 98.68% approval, but pattern = SW Developers / CIS Managers / BI Analysts (tech-only, NY-concentrated). Applied as STRETCH per doctrine (only explicit no-sponsor is a hard stop). Sponsor confidence for People roles = LOW-MODERATE.
fit_note: 4-6 yr ask vs Jamie ~3 = mild stretch (closest YOE of the 3-role batch). Strong fit: end-to-end program/project mgmt, SOPs/knowledge base, AI/automation process redesign, cross-functional, onboarding-lifecycle. Disclosed the slight YOE stretch honestly in cover.
geo_caveat: Ashby Location tag lists 16 specific states (SC, CT, DE, GA, ME, MD, MA, NH, NJ, NC, OH, PA, RI, VT, VA, WV) — all Eastern; OREGON is NOT listed. JD body says 'Remote (US)' with no reside-requirement language, and no explicit geo hard-gate appeared in the apply form. Applied with Portland-OR-(open to relocation) header; if the state list is a true payroll-entity hard-gate, the recruiter will surface it. FLAGGED for awareness.
notes: Ashby button-group Yes/No widgets (class _option_/_active_) needed direct button.click() scoped per-question; verified _active_ class + visual read-back before submit. Pre-submit gate passed (right resume+cover, sponsorship=Yes, work-auth=No, PST). Compensation $97K-$161K, offers equity+bonus.
